creator: teg@dp.pivdenny.ua
text:
System setting was led from a flash card from an image "FreeBSD-9.1-RC3-i386-memstick.img". 

After loading from this flash card and an input in Shell the typical
script of deployment of system on ZFS is fulfilled. Regular initial
setting is led.

-----------------
The equipment: 
The processor "Intel Core i3-3220"
The motherboard "ASUS P8H61-M-LX-R2", video onboard.
http://www.asus.com/Motherboards/Intel_Socket_1155/P8H61M_LX_R20/#overview
HDD SATA 500G.
-----------------
Attempt to replace video a mode leads to system reboot:
%su
#vidcontrol MODE_283 
-----------------
After system preferences on amd64 the error disappeared.
I result reports dmesg and vidcontrol after system
"FreeBSD-9.1-RC3-amd64-memstick.img" reinstallation
--------------------------------------------
